subHeadline: Deep, permanent reference hubs for the engines Mercedes-Benz owners research most — not blog posts, not one-off articles. Every guide is built on real UK enquiry data and Mercedes-specific expertise.

centres.title: OM651 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Every variant, the "Black Death" injector seal story, and the rear-chain access problem — the definitive OM651 guide. 1,250 enquiries in 2025 [MB-VERIFIED].

centres.title: OM654 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The modern diesel's full ownership profile — what changed, what improved, and what to watch. 520 enquiries in 2025 [MB-VERIFIED].

centres.title: OM642 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The V6 diesel's complete guide — oil cooler seals, swirl flaps, and the models it powers. 880 enquiries in 2025 [MB-VERIFIED].

centres.title: M276/M177 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The modern V6/V8 petrol story — from the E-Class to full AMG spec. 390 + 370 enquiries in 2025 [MB-VERIFIED].

centres.title: "Black Death" Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The complete guide to Mercedes diesel injector seal failure — history, symptoms, prevention, and repair cost. The #1 failure category in our 2025 diesel data.

centres.title: OM617 Classic Diesel Guide
centres.description: The legendary W123-era diesel — why it's the keeper engine, what goes wrong, and why values are rising. The classic Mercedes engine hub.

centres.title: AMG Engine Knowledge Centre
centres.description: From the naturally-aspirated M156 to the modern M177/M178 biturbo V8s — the complete AMG engine story.

centres.title: Timing Chain Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The complete guide to Mercedes timing chain failures — OM651, OM646, M276 and more.

footer.title: 100% Data-Verified. Built for Mercedes-Benz Owners.
footer.text: Every knowledge centre is built on real UK enquiry data and Mercedes-specific expertise.
